item.title: Steve Jobs adopted a no ‘bozos’ policy and said the best managers are those who never wanted the job—here are his 3 best management tips
item.description: Hiring only for “professional management” doesn’t work, Steve Jobs said.

item.title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy says sucking up to your boss won’t earn their trust
item.description: Want to earn the trust of your boss and peers? Sucking up to them won’t do the trick, says Amazon’s CEO Andy Jassy.

item.title: Anthropic claims 3 Chinese companies ripped it off, using its AI tools to train their models: ‘How the turn tables’
item.description: Anthropic, which settled a copyright claim by thousands of authors for $1.5 billion months ago, claims the Chinese firms used "distillation" technique...

item.title: The AI leadership reckoning is here
item.description: Your CEO is in danger and generational change is afoot.

item.title: ‘It’s going to be painful for a lot of people’: Software engineers could go extinct this year, says Claude Code creator
item.description: Boris Cherny says Claude Code has been writing all of his code since November.
